scripts.build: npm run build -w @sinergy/shared && npm run build -w @sinergy/matcher && npm run build -w @sinergy/web
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/shared && npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/matcher && npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/shared && npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/matcher && npm run typecheck -w @sinergy/web
